response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience, particularly with GISCollective, but lacks direct C++ or Rust expertise in commercial routing/tiling systems. His background in distributed systems and open-source contributions is relevant, though the role prioritizes deep C++/Rust and navigation-specific experience.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map, aligning with routing data pipelines.
Proven track record in distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Sociomantic, Dunnhumby).
Strong problem-solving and experimentation mindset, evidenced by workshops and open-source projects.
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with no explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing systems.
Limited direct experience with navigation guidance or real-time traffic integration, key to the role.
Broad but not deep focus; may lack specialization in high-scale routing tile optimization.
